We booked this for our anniversary and it did not disappoint. Every surface sparkled — the cleanliness was excellent from lobby to room. Loved the infinity pool and the gym had Peloton bikes, so the amenities were a big draw. Elena at the front desk upgraded us as a surprise; the service made our trip genuinely special.

Business trip turned mini-vacation. Room was spotless with gleaming fixtures, the cleanliness really set the tone. Great pool, solid fitness center, on-site restaurant that served creative dishes — the amenities kept me busy after hours. Concierge got me into a sold-out dinner; that kind of service is rare.

Brought the whole family and the hotel delivered. Not a speck of dust anywhere — the cleanliness impressed all of us, even the kids. Pool was gorgeous, gym was modern, restaurant had something for everyone — the amenities were a hit. Staff bent over backward for us and the service was warm from start to finish.

I'm picky about hotels and this one earned my respect. Bathroom was pristine, linens were crisp, attention to detail was obvious — the cleanliness was impeccable. Rooftop pool with stunning views, well-equipped gym, and an on-site bakery that made mornings special — the amenities stood out. Service was attentive without being overbearing, just the right balance.

What a find. Housekeeping refreshed our room beautifully each day with perfectly aligned hangers and fresh flowers — the cleanliness showed real pride. Crystal-clear infinity pool, an excellent restaurant, and a gift shop with unique local products — the amenities were wonderful. Handwritten welcome note in the room; the service felt genuinely personal.

Flew in late on a Wednesday and the room was waiting in perfect condition — the cleanliness made a great first impression. Tried the spa on Thursday and the gym on Friday — the amenities were first-rate. Doorman, barista, everyone we met made us feel valued; the service elevated the entire stay.

Second time here and it's still great. Room was immaculate, bathroom gleamed — the cleanliness hasn't slipped since our last visit. Heated pool, full-service spa, business center that had everything our team needed — the amenities are consistently excellent. Concierge remembered us from last year; that kind of service keeps us coming back.

Solo trip for a friend's wedding and this hotel made the week. Every morning the room was refreshed to perfection — the cleanliness was outstanding. Sauna, hot tub, rooftop bar with panoramic views — the amenities were a treat after long wedding prep days. From the doorman to the barista, the service was genuine. Only wish the elevator was faster.

Here for a work conference and pleasantly surprised. Spotless room, dust-free surfaces, fresh linens daily — the cleanliness exceeded expectations. Pool was perfect after a long day of sessions, gym had group classes I actually enjoyed — the amenities were way above average. Staff anticipated needs before we voiced them; the service was seamless. Valet was a touch slow though.

Our group booked six rooms and every single one was impeccable — the cleanliness was consistent across the board. Gorgeous pool, world-class spa, restaurant that served the best brunch of our trip — the amenities made us never want to leave. Staff pulled together a last-minute birthday celebration; the service tied it all together beautifully.

Three nights over the holidays. Room 714 was pristine and the bathroom felt brand new — the cleanliness set a high bar. Fitness center rivaled our home gym and the on-site Italian restaurant was genuinely delicious — the amenities were well-curated. Service was professional and kind; the bellhop and concierge were particularly impressive.

Conference week and this hotel made the logistics easy. Polished marble lobby, immaculate suite — the cleanliness radiated luxury. Rooftop pool, dedicated yoga studio, and an on-site bakery that made every morning a treat — the amenities were extensive. Front desk even arranged a surprise birthday cake for my colleague; the service was warm and personalized.

Came here with my mom for a girls' weekend. Not a single thing out of place in our room — the cleanliness was consistently excellent across our five-night stay. Gorgeous lap pool, modern fitness center, restaurant with a diverse menu — the amenities were plentiful. Staff greeted us with genuine smiles each morning; the service was dependable and cheerful.

Travel blogger here, and I've seen hundreds of hotels. Eucalyptus-scented bathroom, spotless room, gleaming fixtures — the cleanliness was impressive. Pool overlooked the garden, gym had brand-new equipment, chef's specials at the restaurant were consistently good — the amenities were a treat. Night concierge went above and beyond to find us a late pharmacy; the service showed real care.

Weekend getaway and we nailed the hotel choice. Stellar room upkeep with daily housekeeping that caught details we wouldn't have noticed — the cleanliness was top-tier. Business center was well-equipped, heated pool was perfect, and the on-site restaurant had a memorable tasting menu — the amenities were excellent. Polished, professional service throughout, though the bar staff could be more attentive during rushes.

Here for a trade show, stayed six nights. Luxurious linens, dust-free room, spotless bathroom daily — the cleanliness never wavered. Diverse amenities including a well-maintained pool, spacious gym, and a spa with aromatherapy treatments — everything we tried was excellent. Housekeeping even left a handwritten note on our last day; the service had heart.

Retirement celebration trip with my partner. Every detail sparkled — the cleanliness left nothing to be desired. Stunning pool area, gym with personal trainers available, and a wine bar with an impressive selection — the amenities were robust. We felt genuinely cared for; the service was warm throughout our stay.

Road trip stop that turned out to be the highlight. Room was magazine-ready — the cleanliness was noteworthy. Sunrise yoga by the pool, weekend brunch at the restaurant — the amenities offered great variety. Concierge arranged a wonderful private tour for us; the service rounded out the experience perfectly.

Annual family reunion hotel and it keeps impressing us. Hallways spotless, rooms flawless, elevator sparkling — the cleanliness is top-to-bottom excellent. Pool, spa, gym, restaurant with both local and international cuisine — the amenities offered something for every generation. Efficient, always-smiling front desk; the service was consistently helpful.

Here on a photography trip and the hotel provided a beautiful backdrop. Flawless room, daily housekeeping that maintained perfection — the cleanliness met a very high standard. Gorgeous rooftop pool, gym with classes we loved — the amenities were a genuine draw. Personalized, warm service that elevated an already excellent property.

First time at this chain and we're converts. Pristine stairwells and spotless common areas told us a lot about the standards — the cleanliness was evident everywhere. Crystal-clear pool, well-stocked fitness center, charming on-site cafe — the amenities were extensive. Gracious, efficient service at every level; really well-run place.

Three-day yoga retreat nearby and this was our home base. Morning-fresh room every day, gleaming bathroom — the cleanliness set the right tone. Pool, spa, gym, beautiful gardens — the amenities supported our wellness focus perfectly. Staff's genuine kindness made us feel at home; the service was the cherry on top.

Red-eye flight, arrived at 5am, and the room was still perfect from the previous day's prep — the cleanliness impressed us even in our exhausted state. Heated pool revived us, gym had everything we needed, restaurant breakfast was outstanding — the amenities delivered when we needed them most. Early check-in was handled gracefully; the service set the tone for a wonderful visit.

Wedding block hotel and it exceeded every expectation. Immaculate ballroom, pristine guest rooms — the cleanliness was faultless. Beautiful pool for the welcome party, excellent restaurant for rehearsal dinner — the amenities were perfect for our group. Staff coordinated everything seamlessly; the service made the planning stress disappear.

Gorgeous room with gleaming floors and a bathroom that could pass any inspection — the cleanliness was outstanding. Stunning rooftop pool, state-of-the-art fitness center, spa treatments that were truly extraordinary — the amenities set the gold standard. Minor hallway noise was our only complaint.

What really won us over was how the cleanliness and service worked together. Room was pristine every day and the staff were incredible — front desk handled our room change gracefully, concierge arranged a private city tour, housekeeping left thoughtful touches. We couldn't have asked for better hospitality.

Not a dust mote in sight, linens that felt luxurious, bathroom that sparkled — the cleanliness set this hotel apart. Stunning heated pool and a spa with treatments we'll rave about for years — the amenities reinforced the experience. Beautifully maintained property from every angle.

Our suite gleamed from floor to ceiling, lobby was always immaculate — the cleanliness was exceptional. Bellhop treated our luggage like treasure, front desk resolved every request within minutes — the service was equally remarkable. Only the limited breakfast menu kept this from five stars.

Came specifically for the pool and it did not disappoint — breathtaking rooftop setup with a swim-up bar. Spa was pure relaxation, gym had brand-new equipment including a yoga studio — the amenities were the highlight. Attentive poolside staff and a bartender who crafted personalized cocktails; the service complemented the facilities beautifully.

Crystal-clear swimming pool, farm-to-table restaurant, well-stocked business center — the amenities were outstanding across the board. Concierge planned our entire sightseeing day with expert knowledge; the service from the whole team was impressive. Truly well-run hotel.

Facilities and people, that's what makes a hotel, and this one nails both. Gorgeous pool with great staff, well-maintained gym, restaurant that surprised us every evening — the amenities and service formed a winning combination. Concierge recommendations were spot-on.

Immaculate room paired with a stunning pool, a gym with rowing machines and free weights, and a seasonal restaurant menu that delighted us nightly — the cleanliness and amenities were both exceptional. Minor hallway sound was our only nitpick in an otherwise excellent stay.

Spotless room from day one and incredible people throughout — the cleanliness and service were the twin pillars of a wonderful stay. Front desk agent surprised us with an upgrade, housekeeping was meticulous, concierge arranged an unforgettable dinner. We felt truly special.

Pool that looked like a resort, spa with skilled therapists, gym with spinning and yoga classes — the amenities made this feel like a destination, not just a hotel. Doorman always had recs, front desk handled everything smoothly — the service was equally impressive.

Honestly blown away by the facilities. Heated pool perfection, genuinely excellent restaurant, business center that covered every need — the amenities exceeded what we expected at this price. Whole team was cheerful and professional; the service felt effortless.

Spotless room, beautiful pool, modern gym, on-site restaurant we ate at every night. The cleanliness and amenities together made this an excellent value. Spa was also memorable. Only the lack of parking shade kept us from giving full marks.

Would bring us back in a heartbeat — immaculate rooms, sparkling bathrooms, hallways always fresh. The cleanliness alone would justify the rate. Housekeeping team clearly takes pride in their work and it shows in every single detail.

Attention to detail was evident everywhere — polished brass, perfectly pressed curtains, fresh flowers replaced daily. The cleanliness was impeccable and spoke to a hotel that genuinely understands what guests notice.

Room was refreshed beautifully each morning, bathroom sparkled, minibar was dust-free and neatly arranged. The cleanliness went above and beyond what we expected. Housekeeping's dedication was the unsung hero of our stay.

Walked in and the lobby gleamed. Room was pristine, bathroom felt newly installed. The cleanliness speaks to a hotel that cares deeply about guest comfort and invests in maintaining standards. Really impressed.

Came for the facilities and left a fan. Spectacular infinity pool, spa with skilled therapists, fitness center that felt premium — the amenities were a destination in themselves. On-site restaurant's tasting menu was a culinary highlight of our trip.

Pool was gorgeous, gym was spacious with new equipment, restaurant served food that rivaled standalone fine dining — the amenities did not disappoint. Hot tub at sunset became our nightly ritual. Worth every penny for the facilities.

Exceeded every expectation on the facility front — pool was beautifully landscaped, spa had unique treatments, gym had panoramic windows that made workouts a pleasure. The amenities were creative and well-executed. Restaurant cocktail menu was also outstanding.

Best hotel gym I've used, full stop. Plus a charming bistro and a heated lap pool — the amenities alone justified our stay. Business center was excellent too, well-equipped and always available when needed.

From the warm welcome at the door to the thoughtful farewell at checkout — every staff member made us feel like the most important guests in the building. Concierge planned an unforgettable anniversary dinner, front desk sent champagne to the room. The service here was exceptional.

Genuinely special people work at this hotel. Front desk learned our preferences after one conversation, restaurant staff remembered our dietary needs — the service was defining. Concierge's knowledge of hidden gems transformed our trip.

Staff elevated everything. Unprompted room upgrade, neighborhood tips from the bellhop, a private cooking class arranged by the concierge — the service was what made this trip unforgettable. Genuine hospitality at its finest.

Every interaction felt real, not scripted. Front desk resolved issues instantly, restaurant team was warm and knowledgeable, housekeeping knocked at convenient times — the service was remarkable. It's the people that make this hotel special.
Wonderful stay that exceeded expectations almost everywhere. Beautifully maintained property, impressive facilities, staff who made us feel at home. Already planning our return visit for next year.
One of our better hotel picks in recent memory. Everything ran smoothly, property was gorgeous, atmosphere was welcoming. A few small things could be improved but nothing that dimmed our enjoyment.
Lovely hotel that got almost everything right. Beautiful rooms, well-maintained grounds, warm staff. We left feeling relaxed and cared for, which is exactly the point.
Excellent stay, would recommend to anyone visiting the area. Great condition property, impressive facilities, premium feel without the pretension. We'll definitely be back.

Gorgeous pool and well-equipped gym complemented by an immaculate room — the cleanliness and amenities worked in perfect harmony. Seasonal restaurant menu was a pleasant surprise. Only limited parking was a minor frustration.

Pristine room and incredible people — the cleanliness and service created a stay we'll remember. Front desk was outstanding, housekeeping was thorough, concierge knowledge was invaluable. Felt genuinely cared for.

Beautiful pool, excellent restaurant, attentive staff throughout — the amenities and service were both standout features. Gym was always clean and well-maintained. This hotel knows how to treat its guests.

Room was refreshed perfectly each day, never a speck of dust — the cleanliness was superb. Heated pool, well-maintained gym that we used daily — the amenities complemented it well. Polished property that delivers on its promises.

Concierge arranged everything from dinner reservations to museum tickets. Pool, spa, and restaurant provided wonderful downtime between outings — the service and amenities combined to create something really special.

Consistency is underrated and this hotel delivers it. Room always spotless, front desk always responsive, housekeeping always thorough — the cleanliness and service were rock-solid throughout our week-long stay.
Stunning pool, immaculate room, spotless gym, well-maintained spa. Restaurant's seasonal menu was a delight. A property that takes care of every detail and makes you want to extend your stay.

Genuine warmth defined every interaction here. Doorman's smile, bartender's personalized recommendations, concierge's detailed sightseeing plan — the people are what set this hotel apart. They clearly love what they do.
